overview: I built 7 tools across 3 domains and 4 agents in ~1,500 lines of Python, progressing from a calculator to an autonomous research agent.

keyPoints.title: Tool descriptions drive Claude's decisions, not just usage
Each tool cycle costs 2–3× a basic conversation in API calls
Research agent: 4 successful fetches out of 20 due to hallucinated URLs
80% of production code is resilience, only 20% is functionality
Claude chains tools autonomously — no workflow logic written
